video_prompts.prompt: The frame begins on a cracked stone tablet in semi-darkness, ambiguous carvings of hands reaching but frozen, with a shadowed marble silhouette partially emerging from the fractured surface at center frame. Camera remains static, no movement. No subject motion—the marble silhouette is completely frozen. Shadows flicker subtly across the fractured stone and tablet surface, emphasizing jagged breaks and shifting torchlight. Duration: 7s

The video starts with a handheld, slightly shaky close tracking shot on a shadowed figure in the left foreground, hunched over, with a cracked golden medallion on the ground. The camera remains close and shaky, never giving a full view of the subject. The figure’s jaw tenses and throat works as they swallow, right hand gripping robe tightens, eyes dart side to side. Shadows in the cave flicker and shift, and faint dust motes drift through the filtered torchlight. Duration: 9s
video_prompts.camera_movement: handheld, slightly shaky close tracking shot that never gives a full view of the subject

video_prompts.prompt: The video begins with a low-angle shot through a fractured stone crack, revealing a small figure hidden in deep shadow, gripping a split medallion tightly. Camera slowly pushes in on the partially mended but still cracked medallion in the figure’s hand. The figure’s right hand trembles slightly as it clutches the medallion, knees shift closer to chest, head lowers further into shadow. Ambient torchlight flickers, casting shifting shadows along the cracked stone wall. Duration: 9s
video_prompts.camera_movement: slow push-in to linger on the object, withholding full context

video_prompts.prompt: The video starts with a handheld, slightly shaky low-angle close shot of a figure standing defiantly center frame, shattered medallion at their feet, fractured stone slabs splitting the background. Camera remains low-angle and slightly shaky, emphasizing tension. The figure’s right fist tightens around the medallion, shoulders square further, chin lifts higher. In the background, the empty robe and medallion fragments remain motionless. Overhead, a few small stone chips fall as the cracked slabs shift imperceptibly. Duration: 10s
video_prompts.camera_movement: handheld, slightly shaky low-angle shot with foreground objects fracturing the background

video_prompts.prompt: The video begins with a wide, static shot of a ruined stone altar scattered with cracked medallion fragments in the foreground. Camera remains static and wide, emphasizing distance and isolation. No character motion—only the ambient dimming of torchlight as shadows lengthen, and faint dust motes drift slowly across the altar. Duration: 10s
video_prompts.camera_movement: wide, static shot that emphasizes distance between figures
